home.title: Edit Video From Anywhere
home.subtitle: A location-agnostic video editor that seamlessly combines local, NAS, and cloud media — giving you studio-grade control without the storage bill.

stats.editingDesc: Edit high-res footage without uploading a single byte to the cloud.
stats.syncDesc: Start on desktop, continue on tablet — your edits follow you.
stats.storageDesc: Local, NAS, or cloud — choose where your media lives.
stats.fidelityDesc: Proxy previews in the cloud, full-resolution when you need it.

features.title: Built for a Distributed World
features.subtitle: Your media, your infrastructure — edit from any device without being tied to a single machine.

local.title: Local editing
local.description: Import 4K video from local storage, trim, add transitions, and export at full resolution — all without touching the cloud.

remote.title: Remote editing
remote.description: Work with compressed cloud proxies for space-efficient editing. Preview with lower-resolution, render at full quality.

crossDevice.title: Cross-device workflow
crossDevice.description: Start a project on your desktop, continue on your tablet. Timeline changes sync seamlessly across devices.

multiSource.title: Multi-source import
multiSource.description: Import video from local storage, images from the cloud, clips from your NAS. All tracked with source metadata.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.description: Your media stays where you put it. Encrypted transfers, role-based access, and zero unnecessary cloud uploads.

metadata.title: Smart metadata
metadata.description: Every edit is stored as metadata. Restore any previous state, collaborate safely, and render only when all data is ready.

workflow.title: How It Works
workflow.subtitle: A simple four-stage pipeline from source media to final render.
workflow.step1Desc: Create media or add it from any source — local drives, network storage, or cloud services.
workflow.step2Desc: Set in/out points, split and merge clips with frame-level precision.
workflow.step3Desc: Drag and drop segments onto the timeline. Trim, layer, and preview.
workflow.step4Desc: Render locally for full fidelity or use cloud processing for speed.

cta.title: Ready to Edit Without Boundaries?
cta.subtitle: Start editing across devices, locations, and storage backends — all from your browser.

home.footer: Location-Agnostic Video Editor — Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Mantine
